title: Acme Electronics announces 12% workforce reduction amid demand slowdown
snippet: Contract manufacturer Acme Electronics confirmed layoffs of roughly 400 staff across its Penang and Guadalajara facilities, citing softer orders from automotive customers.

title: Acme CFO Sarah Wen steps down after four years
snippet: Wen, who joined from Flex in 2022, will be replaced by interim CFO Daniel Park while the board conducts a search. The announcement followed last week's earnings call.

title: Acme Electronics misses Q1 earnings guidance
snippet: Revenue came in at $412M against consensus of $445M; the company cut full-year guidance and noted higher inventory carrying costs.

title: Supplier X files breach-of-contract suit against Acme
snippet: A second-tier supplier alleges Acme failed to honor minimum-volume commitments on a 2024 master services agreement; damages sought of $18M.
